scope: Command transmission officer and chief-of-staff carryover
mobileQa: skipped; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target

flow: Enable queued command mode with 停止して予約
Queue 弾性防御, 北へ15度, 敵指揮, 弾薬節約, 阻止射撃
Verify queue summary 一括混線 +1秒
Issue queue with 一括発令
Check Officers tab and Army Camp recommendations
observations: After Action showed 伝令評価 発令5件 / 遅延5件 / 混線5件 / 最長4秒
Officers tab showed brigade commander history: 伝令混線 第1戦列歩兵大隊, 発令5件, 混線5件, 未着4件, 経験+1, 疲労+5
Officers tab showed chief-of-staff history: 参謀長 警告, 伝令混線, 全軍発令5件, 混線5件, 未着4件, 疲労+6
Army Camp staff recommendations showed 前戦評価 after result application
Campaign reset removed 伝令混線/伝令評価 state
